label: base-character
prompt: A warm, friendly 66-year-old African American woman, a retired grandmother. Soft rounded face with gentle smile lines and crow's-feet, warm brown eyes, natural salt-and-pepper hair worn short and neat. Wearing a soft mauve cardigan over a cream blouse with simple gold stud earrings. Approachable, trustworthy, down-to-earth expression. Extreme realism, detailed skin, realistic facial imperfections, natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up.
